title: Personal Connection

narrative.intro: The evidence leads to a shocking revelation - someone close to you was involved in the original research. Your old companion, someone you thought you knew, was part of the original Nexus research team. They've been in hiding, living under an assumed identity.
narrative.briefing: Your companion has agreed to meet you, but Nexus hunters are closing in. You must reach them before the corporate kill team does. This is a race against time through the lower city.
narrative.completion_success: You've reunited with your old friend. They reveal the full scope of Project Silence - not just experiments, but something far more sinister. They've agreed to testify, but first, you need to get them to safety.
narrative.completion_failure: The hunters reached your friend first. You found signs of a struggle, but no body. A message was left for you: 'Stop digging, or the next grave will be real.'

hunting_protocol.description: Kill team focuses fire on VIP when spotted

primary.description: Reach your companion and escort them to either extraction zone
primary.completion_requirement: Companion reaches any extraction zone alive

secondary.description: Eliminate the Hunter Leader to disrupt pursuit

bonus.description: Complete the mission with no crew members down

special_item.name: Research Team Manifesto
special_item.description: Your companion's personal account of what really happened during Project Silence

bonus_item.name: Companion's Expertise
bonus_item.description: Your companion joins as a crew member with Science skill

tutorial_context: This is a high-stakes mission with personal consequences. Monitor crew health carefully with the Character Status Card, as the enemies are professionals.
